purpose: Regression benchmark for CC-1 identity-policy Deny handling
description: alice can call iam:AddUserToGroup by Allow, but an explicit identity-policy Deny on the same action must win. IAMScope should emit BLOCKED iam_group_membership_escalation with identity_deny evidence, not VALIDATED.

ground_truth.reasoning: AWS IAM evaluation gives explicit Deny precedence over Allow. Alice's inline user policy contains both Allow and Deny for iam:AddUserToGroup, so the effective permission is denied at runtime. Adding alice to the AdministratorAccess-backed admins group is therefore blocked.
aws_documentation_references: IAM policy evaluation logic: explicit deny overrides allow.
Identity-based policies can both allow and explicitly deny the same action; the explicit deny wins.
